positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration featuring a fusion of celestial and botanical elements. The central composition includes intricate, stylized mandalas formed by cosmic swirls, delicate crescent moons, and glowing nebula clouds, interwoven with hyper-detailed blooming bioluminescent flowers and stylized roots. Use a strong, graphic silhouette style, resembling vintage engraving meets modern vector art. Limited color palette of deep midnight blue, rich teal, emerald green, and glowing gold accents. The contrast must be extremely high, making the subject pop against a clean, solid background. Designed for maximum visual impact on apparel, perfect for a central, repeat pattern focus. Intricate linework, clean edges, symmetrical design, detailed illustration.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, cropped, artifacts, noise, out of focus, low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, messy, gradient fade
